lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਾਸਟ ਆਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਕਾਸਟ ਅਗਨਿ ਰਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape kaasatt aap har piaaraa vich kaasatt agan rakhaaeaa |
lines.english: The Beloved Lord Himself is the firewood, and He Himself keeps the fire within the wood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਭੈ ਅਗਨਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਜਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape hee aap varatadaa piaaraa bhai agan na sakai jalaaeaa |
lines.english: The Beloved Lord Himself, all by Himself, permeates them, and because of the Fear of God, the fire cannot burn the wood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮਾਰਿ ਜੀਵਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਸਾਹ ਲੈਦੇ ਸਭਿ ਲਵਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape maar jeevaaeidaa piaaraa saah laide sabh lavaaeaa |3|
lines.english: The Beloved Himself kills and revives; all draw the breath of life, given by Him. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਤਾਣੁ ਦੀਬਾਣੁ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਕਾਰੈ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape taan deebaan hai piaaraa aape kaarai laaeaa |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is power and presence; He Himself engages us in our work.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਆਪਿ ਚਲਾਏ ਤਿਉ ਚਲੀਐ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਜਿਉ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jiau aap chalaae tiau chaleeai piaare jiau har prabh mere bhaaeaa |
lines.english: As the Beloved makes me walk, I walk, as it pleases my Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜੰਤੀ ਜੰਤੁ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਵਜਹਿ ਵਜਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: aape jantee jant hai piaaraa jan naanak vajeh vajaaeaa |4|4|
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is the musician, and the musical instrument; servant Nanak vibrates His vibration. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਉਪਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਕਰਿ ਸੂਰਜੁ ਚੰਦੁ ਚਾਨਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape srisatt upaaeidaa piaaraa kar sooraj chand chaanaan |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself created the Universe; He made the light of the sun and the moon.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਨਿਤਾਣਿਆ ਤਾਣੁ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪਿ ਨਿਮਾਣਿਆ ਮਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: aap nitaaniaa taan hai piaaraa aap nimaaniaa maan |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is the power of the powerless; He Himself is the honor of the dishonored.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਦਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਰਖਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਸੁਘੜੁ ਸੁਜਾਣੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aap deaa kar rakhadaa piaaraa aape sugharr sujaan |1|
lines.english: The Beloved Himself grants His Grace and protects us; He Himself is wise and all-knowing. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਜਪਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: mere man jap raam naam neesaan |
lines.english: O my mind, chant the Name of the Lord, and receive His Insignia.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਧਿਆਇ ਤੂ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣੁ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat mil dhiaae too har har bahurr na aavan jaan | rahaau |
lines.english: Join the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, and meditate on the Lord, Har, Har; you shall not have to come and go in reincarnation again. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਗੁਣ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape hee gun varatadaa piaaraa aape hee paravaan |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself pervades His Glorious Praises, and He Himself approves them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਫੁਰਮਾਣੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape hukam varatadaa piaaraa aape hee furamaan |2|
lines.english: The Beloved Himself obeys His Will, and He Himself issues His Command. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸ ਕਰਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਸਚੁ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape bakhas karaaeidaa piaaraa aape sach neesaan |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself grants His forgiveness, and He Himself bestows the Insignia of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸੇਵ ਕਰਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪਿ ਦਿਵਾਵੈ ਮਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape sev karaaeidaa piaaraa aap divaavai maan |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself commits some to His service, and He Himself blesses them with honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਭਗਤਿ ਭੰਡਾਰ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਵੈ ਦਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape bhagat bhanddaar hai piaaraa aape devai daan |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is the treasure of devotion; He Himself gives His gifts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਤਾੜੀ ਲਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਗੁਣੀ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape taarree laaeidaa piaaraa aape gunee nidhaan |3|
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is absorbed in Samaadhi; He Himself is the treasure of excellence. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਵਡਾ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਪਰਧਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape vaddaa aap hai piaaraa aape hee paradhaan |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is the greatest; He Himself is supreme.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਅਤੁਲੁ ਤੁਲਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੁ ॥੪॥੫॥
lines.translit: aape atul tulaaeidaa piaaraa jan naanak sad kurabaan |4|5|
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is unweighable - He weighs Himself; servant Nanak is forever a sacrifice to Him. ||4||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਤੁਲੁ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape keemat paaeidaa piaaraa aape tul paravaan |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself appraises the value; He Himself is the scale, and the weights.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸੇਵਾ ਲਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਭਗਤਿ ਉਮਾਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape sevaa laaeidaa piaaraa aape bhagat umaahaa |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself commits some to His service; He Himself blesses them with the joy of devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape gun gaavaaeidaa piaaraa aape sabad samaahaa |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself causes us to sing His Glorious Praises; He Himself is absorbed in the Word of His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਲੇਖਣਿ ਆਪਿ ਲਿਖਾਰੀ ਆਪੇ ਲੇਖੁ ਲਿਖਾਹਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape lekhan aap likhaaree aape lekh likhaahaa |1|
lines.english: He Himself is the pen, and He Himself is the scribe; He Himself inscribes His inscription. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਜਪਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਓਮਾਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: mere man jap raam naam omaahaa |
lines.english: O my mind, joyfully chant the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਅਨਦੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਲੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਲਾਹਾ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anadin anad hovai vaddabhaagee lai gur poorai har laahaa | rahaau |
lines.english: Those very fortunate ones are in ecstasy night and day; through the Perfect Guru, they obtain the profit of the Lord's Name. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਾਵਲ ਸੁੰਦਰਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਵੰਸੁ ਵਜਾਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape saaval sundaraa piaaraa aape vans vajaahaa |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is the blue-skinned, handsome one; He Himself plays on His flute.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਗੋਪੀ ਕਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਬਨਿ ਆਪੇ ਗਊ ਚਰਾਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape gopee kaan hai piaaraa ban aape gaoo charaahaa |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is the milk-maid and Krishna; He Himself herds the cows in the woods.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਵਲੀਆਪੀੜੁ ਆਪਿ ਮਰਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਕਰਿ ਬਾਲਕ ਰੂਪਿ ਪਚਾਹਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kuvaleeaapeerr aap maraaeidaa piaaraa kar baalak roop pachaahaa |2|
lines.english: The Beloved Himself took the form of a child, and destroyed Kuwalia-peer, the mad elephant. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਅਖਾੜਾ ਪਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਆਪਿ ਚੋਜਾਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: aap akhaarraa paaeidaa piaaraa kar vekhai aap chojaahaa |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself sets the stage; He performs the plays, and He Himself watches them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਬਲੁ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਬਲੁ ਭੰਨੈ ਮੂਰਖ ਮੁਗਧਾਹਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape hee bal aap hai piaaraa bal bhanai moorakh mugadhaahaa |3|
lines.english: The Beloved Himself, by Himself, is the embodiment of power; He shatters the power of the fools and idiots. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਬਾਲਕ ਰੂਪ ਉਪਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਚੰਡੂਰੁ ਕੰਸੁ ਕੇਸੁ ਮਾਰਾਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: kar baalak roop upaaeidaa piaaraa chanddoor kans kes maaraahaa |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself assumed the form of the child, and killed the demons Chandoor, Kansa and Kaysee.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਆਪੇ ਜਗਤੁ ਉਪਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਵਸਿ ਆਪੇ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਹਥਾਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh aape jagat upaaeidaa piaaraa vas aape jugat hathaahaa |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself created the whole world. In His hands He holds the power of the ages.
